title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
